body: This power bank saved my trip! I was on a 12-hour flight and my phone battery was dying. This charged my iPhone from 10% to 100% twice and still had power left. The size is perfect for travel and doesn't feel too heavy in my bag.

Great capacity for the price. I can charge my tablet and phone multiple times. The LED indicator is helpful to know how much juice is left. Only minor complaint is it takes about 4 hours to fully recharge.
Stopped working after 2 months. It was great at first but now it won't hold a charge. Very disappointed considering the price.
Compact and powerful. Love that it has 2 USB ports so I can charge multiple devices at once. The fast charging works great with my Samsung. Would recommend.
The best power bank I've owned. Charges my devices quickly and the build quality feels premium.
Works as described. Not the fastest charging but good enough for everyday use. The 20000mAh lasts me about 3-4 days of normal phone usage.
Doesn't support fast charging for iPhone as advertised. Misleading product description.
Amazing value! I've bought 3 of these for my family. Everyone loves them. The carrying pouch is a nice bonus.
Good backup charger. Keep it in my car for emergencies. Has saved me multiple times when my phone died while traveling.
